case_studies.title: Consistent Failure Across LLMs on Simple Functions
case_studies.key_finding: Even state-of-the-art models fail on brief, specialized functions due to improper formula usage or fictional code generation[cite: 208, 276].

technical_details.objective: Approximate event accumulation using logarithmic intensity difference from two frames[cite: 275].

model_errors.GPT-5: Applied an improper formula for event change calculation[cite: 258].

case_studies.title: Creative Correctness in 3D Geometry
case_studies.key_finding: LLMs can achieve success through mathematically equivalent but distinctly different implementation paths[cite: 211, 219].

technical_details.GPT-5_approach: Used the Fundamental Matrix (F) operating directly on pixel coordinates[cite: 318].
technical_details.DeepSeek-R1_approach: Transformed inputs to normalized coordinates and applied the Essential Matrix (E)[cite: 319].
technical_details.result: Both achieved 10/10 unit test pass rates despite different logic[cite: 315, 317].

case_studies.title: Textbook Definition Defaulting vs. Specific Semantics
case_studies.key_finding: Models struggle with task-specific implicit semantics, defaulting instead to common textbook definitions[cite: 534, 535].

technical_details.required_logic: Return physical distance (surface radius) from the Gaussian center to the 1-sigma ellipsoidal surface[cite: 487, 489].
technical_details.llm_error: Computed the dimensionless Mahalanobis radius, which is internally consistent but semantically incorrect for this pipeline[cite: 491, 532].

case_studies.title: Loss of Engineering Semantics in Vertex Normal Computation
case_studies.key_finding: LLMs master core routines but often fail to implement crucial engineering robustness and boundary conditions[cite: 591, 596].

missing_semantics: Area-weighted smoothing: Models normalized face normals too early, discarding area information[cite: 585, 591].
Degeneracy handling: Models failed to inject default directions for zero-norm accumulated normals[cite: 587, 591].

case_studies.title: Context Length Impact on MGadapter Fidelity
case_studies.key_finding: Concise, method-focused context yields better algorithmic fidelity than full-paper context which introduces noise[cite: 51, 355, 358].

technical_details.full_paper_performance: Correctly implemented thin anisotropic surfels aligned with local mesh geometry[cite: 555, 556].
technical_details.reduced_context_drift: Reverted to generic 3DGS heuristics with isotropic scales and non-zero thickness[cite: 557, 558].
